name: download_file
description: Download a file from Dropbox by specifying its path or revision. The file metadata is returned in a Dropbox-API-Result response header, and the file content is in the response body.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path of the file to download (e.g., '/Documents/report.pdf'), or a file ID like 'id:abc123'.

parameters.name: rev
parameters.description: Optional revision hash. If specified, downloads a specific version of the file.

body._note: Response body contains the raw file bytes. Metadata is in the Dropbox-API-Result header.
